title: General logprobs_from_logits Triton dispatch
summary: Route CUDA fallback logprobs_from_logits calls through the gathered-logprob Triton helper when flash-attn cross-entropy is unavailable, with dispatcher coverage and benchmark data.
success_gate: Preserve logprobs_from_logits semantics and beat the existing v2 fallback on representative CUDA shapes before changing the default dispatcher.

results.note: CUDA logprobs_from_logits now routes through the gathered-logprob Triton helper when flash-attn and NPU fast paths are unavailable, including 2D remove-padding style inputs while preserving low-precision output dtype semantics.

notes: Syntax checked with python -m py_compile verl/utils/torch_functional.py scripts/benchmark_logprobs_dispatch.py.
